title: Describing a short trip
subtitle: Say where you went, what happened, and how it was.
duolingoBridge: This is a classic A2 speaking/writing task.
overview: Knowledge point 1: combine place, transport, past action, and opinion.
Knowledge point 2: use c’était + adjective for a quick evaluation.

sections.title: Trip answer map
rows: I would like to go back there

items.fr: L’année dernière, je suis allé à Lyon.
items.en: Last year, I went to Lyon.
items.es: El año pasado fui a Lyon.

items.fr: J’ai pris le train avec ma famille.
items.en: I took the train with my family.
items.es: Tomé el tren con mi familia.
Visitamos el centro de la ciudad.

items.fr: Il faisait beau et nous avons pris des photos.
items.en: The weather was nice and we took photos.
items.es: Hacía buen tiempo y tomamos fotos.

items.fr: C’était magnifique et je voudrais y retourner.
items.en: It was wonderful and I would like to go back there.
items.es: Fue maravilloso y quisiera volver allí.
